---
title: "Tutorials"
listing: 
  contents: 
    - "blog/*/index.qmd"
    - "blog/*/index.md"
    - "blog/*/index.ipynb"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [title, author, categories, date, image, description]
  image-align: right
  image-height: "10em"
  feed: true
citation: false
toc: false
comments: false
body-classes: page-tutorials
format: 
  html: 
    page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---

```{=html}
<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
  var cats = document.querySelector('#quarto-margin-sidebar .quarto-listing-category');
  var target = document.querySelector('#quarto-document-content');
  if (cats && target) {
    // Insert after the title block
    var titleMeta = target.querySelector('.quarto-title-meta');
    var anchor = titleMeta || target.firstChild;
    target.insertBefore(cats, anchor.nextSibling);
  }
});
</script>
```
